dataset.description: The Telco customer churn dataset contains information about a fictional telco company that provided home phone and Internet services to 7043 customers in California in Q3. It indicates which customers have left, stayed, or signed up for their service. Multiple important demographics are included for each customer, as well as a Satisfaction Score, Churn Score, and Customer Lifetime Value (CLTV) index. It is designed to facilitate analysis of customer behavior and retention strategies.

desc: The Telco customer churn dataset contains information about a fictional telco company that provided home phone and Internet services to 7043 customers in California in Q3. It indicates which customers have left, stayed, or signed up for their service. Multiple important demographics are included for each customer, as well as a Satisfaction Score, Churn Score, and Customer Lifetime Value (CLTV) index. It is designed to facilitate analysis of customer behavior and retention strategies.
goal: Analyze customer groups based on their status (churned, retained, newly signed up) by comparing key metrics (satisfaction, churn scores, CLTV) and demographic characteristics, to identify potential factors influencing customer churn and retention.
name: Visual Analytics System telco_goal3_1742626091

effect.description: Select individual customers for detailed inspection
Brush to select customer groups based on CLTV and satisfaction ranges

visualization.description: Scatter plot showing relationship between CLTV and Satisfaction Score, colored by customer status (Churned/Retained/Joined)

effect.description: Filter subsequent views by selected service type and age group

visualization.description: Grouped bar chart showing average churn scores split by service type and age demographics
Heatmap showing churn rates by contract length and tenure duration, split by gender
Radial chart combining churn reasons, payment methods and active promotions

data.reason: Detail layer to understand churn rates based on contract length, tenure, and customer demographics.
data.requirement: Heatmap showing churn rates by contract length and tenure duration, split by gender

data.reason: Insight layer to identify key factors influencing customer churn.
data.requirement: Radial chart combining churn reasons, payment methods, and active promotions

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW view_1_intermediate AS SELECT Status_Analysis.customer_id, Status_Analysis.cltv, Status_Analysis.satisfaction_score, Status_Analysis.customer_status FROM Status_Analysis;
sqls.name: view_1_intermediate

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW view_2_intermediate AS SELECT Status_Analysis.customer_id, Status_Analysis.churn_score, Online_Services.internet_type, Customer_Info.age FROM Status_Analysis, Online_Services, Customer_Info WHERE Status_Analysis.customer_id = Online_Services.customer_id AND Status_Analysis.customer_id = Customer_Info.customer_id;
sqls.name: view_2_intermediate

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW view_3_intermediate AS SELECT Payment_Info.customer_id, Payment_Info.contract, Service_Options.tenure, Customer_Info.gender FROM Payment_Info, Service_Options, Customer_Info WHERE Payment_Info.customer_id = Service_Options.customer_id AND Payment_Info.customer_id = Customer_Info.customer_id;
sqls.name: view_3_intermediate

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW view_4_intermediate AS SELECT Status_Analysis.customer_id, Status_Analysis.churn_category, Payment_Info.payment_method, Service_Options.offer FROM Status_Analysis, Payment_Info, Service_Options WHERE Status_Analysis.customer_id = Payment_Info.customer_id AND Status_Analysis.customer_id = Service_Options.customer_id;
sqls.name: view_4_intermediate

concat.description: Overview: Scatter plot of CLTV vs Satisfaction Score, colored by customer status
concat.title: Overview

concat.description: Exploration: Bar chart showing average churn scores by service type and age
Detail: Heatmap showing churn rates by contract length and tenure duration, split by gender
Insight: Radial chart combining churn reasons, payment methods, and active promotions
